subcodes.first_line: The Wronged One testifieth that He, verily, is the All-Compelling, the Self-Subsisting, Who hath appeared from the horizon of the known and speaketh before all faces [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد المظلوم بانه لهو المهیمن القیوم الذی ظهر من افق المعلوم و ینطق امام وجوه
subcodes.subjects: @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @exhortations and counsels, @power of the Manifestation of God, @identity; relationship of Manifestation of God to God
